name: WRINKLES?
title: WRINKLES?
concern: Lack of sleep, stress, pollution, or smoking can disrupt your skin's natural biorhythm. When weakened, the skin becomes dehydrated and wrinkles set in, losing its youthful glow.
solution: Cleanse with Caress Cleansing Milk and Toning Lotion to prepare your skin. Apply ANTI-AGE PRO Day Serum in the morning to maximize skin's protective potential with chronopeptides and Alpine Rose stem cells, followed by ANTI-AGE PRO Day Cream for antioxidant protection. At night, use ANTI-AGE PRO Night Care to support skin renewal with its time-release formula and AQUA PLUS Multi-Moisturizing Sleeping Mask to restore water reserves. Spray SKIN VITALITY Alpine Micro-Mist throughout the day to hydrate and refresh.

name: LACK OF RADIANCE?
title: LACK OF RADIANCE?
concern: After age 40, skin naturally loses radiance. External aggressions like sun and pollution, or internal factors, can affect cell renewal and exacerbate this loss of luminosity.
solution: Cleanse with Caress Cleansing Milk and Toning Lotion. Apply SKIN VITALITY Healthy Glow Serum each morning for instant radiance, followed by SKIN VITALITY Healthy Glow Day Cream enriched with Swiss Apricot extract. Use Beauty-Enhancing Micro-Peel weekly to remove dead cells and improve product penetration. Use SKIN VITALITY Sleeping Mask "Baby Skin" Radiance overnight to detoxify and smooth skin. Eating beta-carotene rich foods and moderate exercise also help maintain a healthy glow.

name: UNEVEN COMPLEXION?
title: UNEVEN COMPLEXION?
concern: Stress, lack of sleep, and environmental factors can damage skin's balance. The complexion loses radiance, becomes uneven, and may turn greyish or develop dark spots, making skin appear older.
solution: Remove makeup with Alpine Softness Micellar Water. Apply SKIN VITALITY Healthy Glow Serum each morning for instant radiance, followed by Healthy Glow Day Cream. Use SKIN VITALITY Sleeping Mask overnight to detoxify and unify skin. Weekly use of Beauty-Enhancing Micro-Peel removes dead cells and improves product penetration. Spray Alpine Micro-Mist to refresh throughout the day.

name: DEHYDRATED SKIN?
title: DEHYDRATED SKIN?
concern: Dehydrated skin lacks moisture, feels tight, and shows premature wrinkles. Unlike dry skin, it may still produce sebum in the T-zone while feeling uncomfortable elsewhere.
solution: Cleanse with Alpine Softness Micellar Water or Caress Cleansing Milk and Toning Lotion. Apply AQUA PLUS Intensive Serum each morning for deep hydration with hyaluronic acids, followed by AQUA PLUS Multi-Moisturizing Featherlight Cream for 24h protection. Use AQUA PLUS Sleeping Mask at night to restore water reserves. Weekly Micro-Peel improves product absorption. Spray Alpine Micro-Mist to refresh skin throughout the day.

name: DRY SKIN?
title: DRY SKIN?
concern: Very dry skin is thin with insufficient moisture, a dull complexion, and lacks tonicity. Blemishes like roughness, flakiness, lines, and redness are common.
solution: Cleanse with Caress Cleansing Milk and Toning Lotion. Apply NUTRI ELIXIR Essential Serum each morning to revitalize with Swiss Linseed oil rich in omega 3, 6 and 9, followed by NUTRI ELIXIR Ultimate Cream with pro-lipid booster. At night, use NUTRI ELIXIR Absolute Night Balm to replenish lipids and re-densify skin. Spray SKIN VITALITY Alpine Micro-Mist to refresh throughout the day.

name: TIRED, DULL SKIN?
title: TIRED, DULL SKIN?
concern: Fatigue, stress, and environmental factors leave skin looking tired and dull. The complexion loses its natural radiance, appearing lackluster with more pronounced fine lines.
solution: Cleanse with Caress Cleansing Milk and Toning Lotion. Apply SKIN VITALITY Healthy Glow Serum each morning to restore radiance, followed by Healthy Glow Day Cream enriched with Swiss Apricot extract. Use SKIN VITALITY Sleeping Mask overnight to detoxify and smooth skin. Spray Alpine Micro-Mist throughout the day to hydrate and energize.

products.name: SKIN VITALITY Healthy Glow Day Cream

name: CLOGGED SKIN?
title: CLOGGED SKIN?
concern: Oily skin produces excessive sebum, creating a shiny film with dilated pores often clogged with blackheads. The complexion appears blotchy, yellowish or greyish.
solution: Cleanse with PORE DETOX Foaming Cleanser to absorb excess sebum, followed by PORE DETOX Toning Lotion to balance oil and close pores. Apply AQUA PLUS Intensive Serum for hydration, then PORE DETOX Hydra Matt Fluid to regulate sebum and minimize pores. Use PORE DETOX Purifying Mask once or twice weekly to unblock pores. Weekly Micro-Peel removes dead cells and improves product penetration.

name: DILATED PORES?
title: DILATED PORES?
concern: Mixed skin has an oily T-zone (forehead, nose, chin) while the rest remains normal. This leads to shine and dilated pores in the median zone.
solution: Cleanse with PORE DETOX Foaming Cleanser to eliminate excess sebum without drying, followed by PORE DETOX Toning Lotion to balance oil and close pores. Apply AQUA PLUS Intensive Serum for hydration, then PORE DETOX Hydra Matt Fluid to minimize pores with its soft-focus micro-pigments. Use PORE DETOX Purifying Mask once or twice weekly to tighten pores and remove shine.

name: CLEAR COMPLEXION?
title: CLEAR COMPLEXION?
concern: A clear complexion reflects healthy, balanced skin. However, tiredness, inadequate protection, or wrong products can cause temporary loss of freshness and radiance.
solution: Mavala Moisturizing Tinted Cream protects against environmental damage while maintaining ideal moisture and diminishing skin irregularities. Mavala Transparent Pressed Powder provides a uniform, matt, and velvety finish while regulating the skin's hydrolipidic balance. For a flawless finish, use Magic Powder to set your makeup with a translucent, weightless layer. Mavala Serum Foundation combines skincare and coverage for a natural, luminous look. Use treatment products adapted to your skin type from the MAVALA face care range.

name: DULL COMPLEXION?
title: DULL COMPLEXION?
concern: A dull complexion lacks freshness and luminosity. Tiredness, health conditions, lack of proper care, or wrong products can make skin lose its radiance.
solution: Revitalize a dull complexion with the SKIN VITALITY range. Apply SKIN VITALITY Healthy Glow Serum each morning for an instant boost of radiance, followed by SKIN VITALITY Healthy Glow Day Cream enriched with Swiss Apricot extract. Use Beauty-Enhancing Micro-Peel weekly to remove dead cells and reveal fresher skin. Spray SKIN VITALITY Alpine Micro-Mist throughout the day to hydrate and refresh. At night, use SKIN VITALITY Sleeping Mask "Baby Skin" Radiance to detoxify and smooth skin overnight.

name: BLOTCHY COMPLEXION?
title: BLOTCHY COMPLEXION?
concern: A blotchy complexion is characteristic of oily or mixed skin. Excess sebum forms a shiny film and blackheads make the complexion unclear and yellowish or greyish.
solution: Address a blotchy complexion with the PORE DETOX range to regulate excess sebum. Cleanse with PORE DETOX Perfecting Foaming Cleanser to purify without drying. Apply PORE DETOX Perfecting Toning Lotion to refine pores, and PORE DETOX Hydra-Matt Fluid daily to reduce shine while maintaining hydration. Use PORE DETOX Perfecting Purifying Mask weekly for a deep cleanse. For coverage, Magic Powder provides a translucent, mattifying finish, while Serum Foundation offers natural-looking coverage with skincare benefits.

name: COMPLEXION WITH IRREGULARITIES?
title: COMPLEXION WITH IRREGULARITIES?
concern: Minor imperfections like redness, pigmentary blemishes, dark circles, or light acne scars create irregularities that make the complexion lack clarity. Tiredness and environmental factors can accentuate these issues.
solution: Mavala Dream Foundation uses micronized pigments for modular coverage and photo-active powders for a soft-focus effect that smoothes lines and imperfections. Mavala Wet and Dry Powder provides excellent coverage—apply with a wet sponge for best results. Mavala Transparent Pressed Powder gives a uniform, velvety finish. All products come in different shades. Use treatment products adapted to your skin type from the MAVALA face care range.
